title: The Eisenhower Matrix
author: From: The 7 Habits of Highly Effective People
content: Distinguish between the urgent and the important. Most people spend their lives reacting to the urgent, leaving no time for the important.

title: First Principles Thinking
author: From: The Art of Thinking Clearly
content: Boil things down to their fundamental truths and reason up from there, rather than reasoning by analogy.

title: Circle of Competence
author: From: Poor Charlie’s Almanack
content: You don't have to be an expert on everything. You only need to know the perimeter of your own competence.

title: The Pareto Principle (80/20)
author: From: The 80/20 Principle
content: 80% of your results come from 20% of your efforts. Identify that 20% and double down.

title: Opportunity Cost
author: From: The Art of Thinking Clearly
content: Every choice is a trade-off. The cost of an action is the value of the next best alternative you didn't choose.
